hyperedges.label: Iris Transition System (keyhole entrance + nav transitions across all pages)

nodes.label: Cloudflare Admin Workflow
nodes.rationale: One-off Cloudflare operations run from CI because the session sandbox cannot reach api.cloudflare.com directly; the GitHub runner can, and results are emitted as ::notice:: annotations which ARE readable via the GitHub API. verify-live uses mindcoding.pages.dev because it bypasses the zone's bot challenge, making it reliable for content-freshness checks.

nodes.label: Deploy to Cloudflare Pages Workflow
nodes.rationale: Verifies Cloudflare credentials with sanitized output (lengths only, whitespace check) and auto-creates the 'mindcoding' Pages project if missing before deploying dist via wrangler-action.

nodes.label: Art Courier Workflow
nodes.rationale: Triggered by changes to tools/art-manifest.json; fetches and optimizes card artwork with Python (requests, pillow, ffmpeg) and commits it back to public/art as bot user 'art-courier'.

nodes.label: build_rolls.mjs Static Roll Generator
nodes.rationale: Generates static roll + entry pages for SEO at build time (INDEXABLE=1, BASE_URL from SITE_URL var) so the JS-rendered channel rolls also exist as indexable static pages.

nodes.label: THE ENTRANCE Veil Gate
nodes.rationale: Hold-to-enter keyhole gate (700ms hold) in front of the whole site. Design intent: skip the gate within the same session via sessionStorage 'mc-in', honor prefers-reduced-motion, hide entirely under noscript, and after 6 seconds allow a plain click as a safety hatch in case the canvas fails to draw. On completion it dispatches 'mc:enter' to wake scroll-life so the masthead animates immediately.

nodes.label: The Programmed Self Interactive Emblem
nodes.rationale: Interactive canvas emblem (two mirrored profiles, keyhole, star, circuit pathways) the visitor can drag apart; it always reforms, demonstrating the thesis that willpower alone does not change the underlying program. Telemetry is 'honest' (displacement %, pattern-reasserted time). The reveal threshold was retuned to peak >= 4 to match the emblem's region-weighted meter — the old value of 8 was single-profile calibration and never fired on the emblem. After 2 reforms a lesson line appears: 'FORCE DOESN'T CHANGE IT. THE DRAW DOES'.

nodes.label: Zine Design System (Two Inks on Midnight)
nodes.rationale: Set like a zine with two inks on midnight paper (#070B1A): GOLD (#D79A4A) = the brand, the chosen, the sacred; RED (#FF2B06) = the pattern, the alarm, the thing that turns on you. One border token (--bd:8px), grid under everything, zero frameworks. Ruled 07-12: headline dots run red like the masthead; on wide desks (>=1240px) 'THE SHEET' centers the zine at 1200px keeping the spine left. The moire halftone is the one sanctioned paint-property exception to the transform/opacity animation rule.
nodes.norm_label: zine design system (two inks on midnight)

nodes.label: The Draw (Card as Mirror)
nodes.rationale: One card, one unrehearsed perspective: the card is framed as an interruption, not a command or prediction — a way to encounter your story from an unprepared angle. 78 plates, gold on midnight. No saved readings by design — each reading is unique.

nodes.label: Insight Reveals, Repetition Recodes
nodes.rationale: Core principle of the channels: seeing the program is not the same as rewriting it — insight reveals, repetition recodes. Each channel supplies new words, images, music and practices to rehearse, because the mind keeps learning from whatever is rehearsed.

nodes.label: The Recode Channels (Abundance, Love, Spirit, Wellness, Books)
nodes.rationale: Five numbered channels of free music, affirmations and practices. Each channel roll pairs an instruction with its recording: LIVE items open their YouTube recordings; IN PREPARATION items are inked and awaiting release. Everything is free.
nodes.norm_label: the recode channels (abundance, love, spirit, wellness, books)

nodes.label: Share Widget (X / Facebook / WhatsApp / Copy Link)
nodes.rationale: Identical inline IIFE duplicated across the home page and all five channel roll pages: builds intent URLs for X, Facebook and WhatsApp from location.href/document.title, and falls back from navigator.clipboard to a prompt() for copy-link.
nodes.norm_label: share widget (x / facebook / whatsapp / copy link)
